dataList.name: Trial Extraction : A.B.S
dataList.desc:
Deal +10% damage with Attack Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn'
- If the Skill applies [Combustion] Count on self, Clash Power +1
- Deal +1% damage for every 2% missing HP on self (max 15%)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Attack Skills deal more damage, gain Clash Power when conditions are met

dataList.name: Trial Extraction : Lantern
dataList.desc:
Deal +10% damage with Attack Skills that inflict [Burst] Potency or Count
- At 20%+ missing HP on self, Clash Power +1
- Deal +1% damage with Attack Skills for every 1 (sum of [Aggro] on all Skill Slots on self) (max 15%)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Attack Skills deal more damage, gain Clash Power when conditions are met

dataList.name: Modified Extraction : AEDD
dataList.desc:
If this unit gained [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge' over maximum limit this turn, gain 1 [AttackUp] next turn for every 2 surplus Stack (2 per turn per Identity)
- Identities with Base Skills that gain or consume [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge': max 6 per turn per Identity instead
- If this unit has [HighVoltageExoshell], also gain 1 [Charge] Potency (once per Encounter)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain [AttackUp] based on surplus [Charge] Count, gain [Charge] when conditions are met

dataList.name: Someone's Dropped Employee Card
dataList.desc:
Limbus Company Identities:
- Turn Start: Gain (# of Limbus Company Identities participating in battle / 3) [ParryingResultUp] (max 2; rounded down)

LCE Identities:
- Deal +(# of Identities in battle wearing E.G.O Gears x 10)% damage (max 30%)
- On same-faction Ally Death: Gain 1 E.G.O resource each for all Affinities; gain 1 [PlusCoinValueUp] and 1 [MinusCoinValueUp] at Turn Start for the rest of this Encounter (2 times per Encounter per Identity)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain [ParryingResultUp] based on the number of Limbus Company Identities participating in battle
Deal more damage based on the number of Identities wearing E.G.O Gears participating in battle
On same-faction Ally Death: Gain E.G.O resources; gain [PlusCoinValueUp] and [MinusCoinValueUp] at Turn Start for this Encounter, starting from the next turn

dataList.name: Spicebush, Glasses, and Mailed Letter
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2, #3 Deployed Identities]

When winning a Clash with an Attack Skill that inflicts [Burst] Potency or Count, inflict 5 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count against the target (once per turn per Identity)

When Clashing against an enemy with a slower Speed, gain Final Power +1 and deal +25% damage

When winning a Clash against an enemy with [AttackUp] buff, gain 3 [AttackUp] for the next turn, and inflict 3 [AttackDown] on the enemy that lost the Clash (3 times per turn per Identity)

Every time Skill 1, Skill 2, or Skill 3 is used, activate the following effect (once per Skill rank):
- The unit that used said Skill gains 1 [Agility] and 1 [SkillPowerUp] at Turn Start for this Encounter (can stack up to 3 times)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: On Clash Win: Inflict [Burst] on target
When Clashing against an enemy with a slower Speed, gain Final Power and deal more damage
Gain [AttackUp] on self and inflict [AttackDown] on the enemy when conditions are met
Gain [Agility] and [SkillPowerUp] at Turn Start when conditions are met

dataList.name: A Small, Lovely Violin
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #5, #6 Deployed Identities]

Heal 10% of the HP damage dealt with a Skill (max 20 per Skill)

On Clash Win: Gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] (2 times per turn per Identity)

On Skill Use: Gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] (2 times per turn per Identity)

Deal +10% damage with Blunt Skills

Deal +(# of Clashes x 6)% damage with the Skill that won the Clash (max 30%)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Heal HP on self based on damage dealt with a Skill
Deal more damage with Blunt Skills
Deal more damage with Skills that won the Clash
